description:
Comprehensive audit and content overhaul of the Astro/Starlight documentation site (apps/docs). This is NOT about the per-component documentation pages (those are handled by separate tickets). This covers the site-wide content, navigation accuracy, and showcase/planning sections.

## Scope

### 1. Fact-Check Everything
- **Component count** — Sidebar badge says "84" but we have 73 component directories. Some sidebar entries are sub-components (hx-accordion-item, hx-carousel-item, etc.) that live inside parent directories. Reconcile and fix the badge count.
- **Tech stack claims** — Verify all version numbers, library references, feature claims
- **Architecture docs** — Verify monorepo structure, build pipeline, testing strategy descriptions match current reality
- **Getting Started pages** — Verify installation instructions, quick start guide actually works
- **API Reference** — Check if it's populated or placeholder

### 2. Tone Overhaul — "Interview Prep" → "Lessons from the Battlefield"
The Discovery/Planning/Prototype sections currently read like a technical interview presentation. Transform the tone:
- **Before:** Academic, theoretical, "here's what we would do" language
- **After:** Practitioner voice, battle-tested, "here's what we built and why it works"
- **Target sections:**
  - `pre-planning/` — Overview, Architecture, Components, Design System, Docs Hub, Building Guide, Drupal Guide
  - `prototype/` — Overview, Rapid Prototype, Tech Stack Validation
  - `architecture/` — Overview, Monorepo, Build Pipeline, Testing

### 3. Showcase Pages — Make Them Great
These planning/discovery/prototype pages ARE the showcases. They should demonstrate:
- Real decisions with real tradeoffs (not hypothetical)
- Actual metrics and results where possible
- Code examples from the real codebase, not generic samples
- The "why" behind every architectural choice
- Lessons learned (reference HELIX-PLATFORM-PROTO-LESSONS.md where relevant)

### 4. Navigation & Structure
- Verify every sidebar link resolves to an actual page (no 404s)
- Check for orphaned pages not in the sidebar
- Ensure collapsed sections make logical sense
- GitHub social link points to `himerus/wc-2026` — verify this is correct (or should it be `bookedsolidtech/helix`?)

## Acceptance Criteria
- Component count badge matches reality
- All sidebar links resolve (zero 404s)
- All fact claims verified or corrected
- Discovery/Planning/Prototype sections rewritten in practitioner voice
- No "interview prep" tone remains
- All code examples tested or verified against actual codebase
- `npm run verify` passes after all changes

## Files to modify
- `apps/docs/astro.config.mjs` (sidebar badge, any broken links)
- `apps/docs/src/content/docs/pre-planning/*.md` (tone overhaul)
- `apps/docs/src/content/docs/prototype/*.md` (tone overhaul)
- `apps/docs/src/content/docs/architecture/*.md` (fact-check + tone)
- `apps/docs/src/content/docs/getting-started/*.md` (fact-check)
- `apps/docs/src/content/docs/index.mdx` (landing page accuracy)
title: AUDIT: Astro/Starlight docs site — fact-check, tone overhaul, and showcase pages
